name: Ben & Jerry's New York Super Fudge Chunk
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the coarsely chopped chocolate, pecans, walnuts, and chocolate-covered almonds in a bowl. Cover and refrigerate.
2. Melt the unsweetened chocolate in the top of a double boiler over hot, not boiling water.
3. Whisk in the milk, a little at a time, and heat, stirring constantly until smooth. Remove from the heat and let cool.
4. Whisk the eggs in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy (1-2 minutes).
5. Whisk in the sugar, a little at a time, then continue whisking until completely blended (about 1 minute more).
6. Add the cream, vanilla, and salt and whisk to blend.
7. Pour the chocolate mixture into the cream mixture and blend. Cover and refrigerate until cold (about 1-3 hours), depending on your refrigerator.
8. Transfer the cream mixture to an ice cream maker and freeze following the manufacturer's instructions.
9. After the ice cream stiffens (about 2 minutes before it is done), add the chocolate and nuts, then continue freezing until the ice cream is ready.
Makes one Generous Quart.
